metadata.claim_text: Treating wrist dislocation in isolation without checking related wrist, tendon, or nerve neighborhoods in the cluster.
Document neurovascular status, key anatomic structures (lunate, scaphoid, capitate), stability assessment, and escalation plan for wrist dislocation.
Early protected motion and therapy goals for wrist dislocation should align with tendon, ligament, and joint stability constraints.
